author: Subramanyam6
name: 11L XSA + AdamW v_t Saliency-Weighted GPTQ + SVD BigramSystem
blurb: Non-record. Novel AdamW v_t saliency injection into GPTQ Hessian diagonal (optimizer second-moments as quantization guidance, 0 extra artifact bytes) + SVD-initialized BigramSystem. Corrected 3-seed mean BPB: 1.427 (raw logs show 0.975-1.028 due to BYTES_PER_TOKEN=3.5 vs actual ~2.44). Post-GPTQ sliding eval ~1.49 BPB corrected (seed 314). Does not beat SOTA or baseline on BPB; documents techniques plus throughput/logging/post-quant analysis (no FA3, ~700 steps in 600s).
val_bpb_note: 3-seed mean, corrected for bytes_per_token=2.436 (implied by SOTA log pairs). Raw script BPB uses BYTES_PER_TOKEN=3.5 (wrong default).
val_loss_note: Approximate mean CE nats/token across 3 seeds pre-quant (from raw log BPB * ln(2) * 3.5 / seq).

1337.artifact_note: model.bin not preserved (pod terminated after GPTQ, 8.72 MB per log)

42.artifact_note: model.bin not preserved (pod terminated after GPTQ, 8.88 MB per log)

314.val_bpb_note: Raw from log @step600 (wall-clock hit at step 698); corrected = raw * 3.5 / 2.436
314.val_bpb_post_gptq_note: Post-GPTQ sliding-window eval (stride=64, 1M tokens): raw bits/token=3.6251, BPB=3.6251/2.436

novel_contributions: AdamW v_t (exp_avg_sq) injected into GPTQ Hessian diagonal — 0 extra artifact bytes
SVD-initialized BigramSystem via truncated SVD of log-bigram co-occurrence matrix
GPU-native BigramSystem accumulation via CUDA index_add_ (no numpy copy bottleneck)
known_issues: BYTES_PER_TOKEN hardcoded to 3.5; actual for sp1024 on FineWeb is ~2.436 — all log BPBs inflated by ~1.44x
No Flash Attention 3: ~700 steps per 600s vs SOTA's ~6900 steps
fp32 softmax for XSA numerical stability (only needed without FA3)
grad_accum=4 required for OOM-free 786K batch without FA3 kernel efficiency
calibration: AR self-generated, 32 seqs x 1024 tokens, fixed seed
